Brendon McCullum Under Pressure as ECB Chief Evaluates Ashes Debacle

Jan 3, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Brendon McCullum Faces Uncertain Future After Ashes Loss

England coach Brendon McCullum is under intense scrutiny following the team’s disappointing performance in the 2025-26 Ashes series. After a convincing defeat in the third Test by 82 runs, England fell to a 3-0 series deficit against Australia, raising serious questions about McCullum’s “Bazball” approach and his leadership. The team’s failure to secure a series win in Australia has prompted the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) to review the situation and assess the coach’s future ahead of the 2026 season.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Brendon McCullum Under Pressure as ECB Chief Evaluates Ashes Debacle
